description: A clean agency statistics card on a deep navy-blue textured (wood-grain-like) background. Top-left is the round U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal/eagle in white, beside three lines of white serif text: 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. A thin red horizontal rule separates the header. Centered below in large white serif type is the headline 'Enforcement Update' with the subheading 'January 24, 2025'. The key statistics are displayed prominently in large white serif numerals: '593 Arrests' and '449 Detainers Lodged'. At the bottom in italic white serif is the caption 'ICE single-day statistics'. The design is restrained, official, and template-based (DHS/ICE branding, no photos). Messaging technique: it broadcasts daily enforcement metrics to project momentum and effectiveness of immigration crackdowns, using authoritative government branding and big numbers to signal aggressive action. Target audience: the public and media, demonstrating the administration delivering on immigration-enforcement promises.
notable_text: Enforcement Update January 24, 2025 | 593 Arrests | 449 Detainers Lodged | ICE single-day statistics
